book.resultsFootnote: Free cancellation · Pay at hotel options available
book.rateNote: All rates include free Wi-Fi, pool & gym access.
book.addonsBody: Optional extras — handpicked by Ivy. Add what fits your stay; skip the rest.
book.detailsBody: We'll send confirmation and pre-arrival messages to this guest.
book.requestsPlaceholder: Honeymoon celebration, allergy notes, preferred floor…
book.terms: I agree to the booking policies and the privacy notice. I want Ivy to email me trip-prep tips.
book.payMock: Mock checkout for prototype. No real charges will be made.
book.walletGcash: You'll be redirected to GCash to authorize the payment. We won't store your wallet credentials.
book.walletMaya: Maya checkout opens in a new tab. Confirm to complete payment.
book.walletPaypal: Sign in to PayPal in the next step to finish payment.
book.walletAlipay: Scan the QR with Alipay in the next screen to pay. Settle in CNY at today's rate.
book.confirmBody: Your stay is booked. Confirmation has been sent to {email}. The team can't wait to welcome you to Panglao.
book.beforeArriveBody: Pre-check in on the Ivywall guest app and get a head start on tours, dining reservations, and your spa schedule.

ourStory.label: Our story
ourStory.body1: We built Bohol's first international-chain beach resort the way the island lives — unhurried, generous, and proud of where it stands. Eighty rooms wrapped around a pool, a rooftop above Alona Beach, and a welcome you feel from the first hello.
ourStory.body2: Every detail is woven in native Filipino craft — banig headboards, capiz light, and people who learn your name by dinner. Four-star comfort, told in a Boholano accent.

stickyStory.label: A sense of place
stickyStory.heading: Designed for here.
stickyStory.c1Body: We didn't try to import a foreign hotel onto Panglao. We set a higher bar for a hotel that belongs here — Best Western Plus standards, native Filipino soul.
stickyStory.c2Title: Native Filipino detail, room by room.
stickyStory.c2Body: Banig-weave geometric headboards. Capiz-shell light. Palm-wood inlay. Each one made by a Visayan supplier we know by name.
stickyStory.c3Body: Local roasts, banana-leaf platings, signature seafood for the table. Breakfast that asks you to linger.
stickyStory.c4Body: Calamansi mojitos and the Bohol horizon. The rooftop opens at four — most guests stay through to the second cocktail.

rooms.label: Rooms & Suites
rooms.heading: Four ways to settle into
rooms.body: Each room is built around a quiet luxury — capiz-shell light, banig accents, palm-wood inlay. Pick your view, pick your pace. Every category includes complimentary water, tea and coffee, and resort-wide Wi-Fi.

dining.label: Two restaurants · one menu of memory
dining.heading: Bohol
dining.body: Slow Filipino breakfasts at Alon. Sunset cocktails crafted with local ingredients at Teraza. Both venues open to the air, both designed around the way an island day should feel.

expBento.lead: Handpicked experiences that showcase the best of Bohol's nature, culture, and adventures.
expBento.foot: All experiences can be arranged as private tours.

ivyBand.body: Ivy handles every question — room availability, rates, local tips, booking confirmations — in real time, in your language. She is the front desk that never sleeps.
ivyBand.f1Desc: Never wait on hold. Ivy answers instantly, day or night.
ivyBand.f2Desc: English, Filipino, Japanese, Korean, and Mandarin.
ivyBand.f3Desc: Checks availability and locks in your reservation on the spot.
ivyBand.f4Desc: Just speak. Ivy is built for natural conversation, not menus.
ivyBand.ctaSub: Voice & text · No app download · Works on any device
ivyBand.chatMsg1: Hi! I'm Ivy 🌟 I can check availability, share rates, and confirm your booking right now. When are you thinking of visiting Panglao?
ivyBand.chatUser: We'd like a sea-view room, end of March, two adults.
ivyBand.chatMsg2Pre: Perfect timing — March is beautiful on Alona Beach. I have our
ivyBand.chatMsg2Post: available from March 28. Shall I hold it for you?
ivyBand.chatInput: Tap to speak or type a message…

ctaBand.body: A team that genuinely wants you back — booking takes about a minute.

highlights.label: The resort, in one glance
highlights.heading: Small enough to feel personal.
highlights.body: 80 rooms means the team learns your name by day two. The grounds, the pool, the rooftop — all five minutes apart, never more.
highlights.i1Desc: Superior, Deluxe, Premier with direct pool access, and Family — all in native Filipino detail.
highlights.i2Desc: Free-form pool at the heart of the resort, opening into a seaside garden and a Panglao white-sand stretch.
highlights.i3Desc: Alon All Day Dining for slow Filipino breakfasts. Teraza Rooftop Deck for sunset cocktails with local ingredients.
highlights.i4Desc: Panglao's east-facing coast catches the morning. Teraza catches the evening. The whole day holds.
highlights.i5Desc: Panglao International Airport (TAG) — about ten minutes by car. Arrival transfers easily arranged.
highlights.i6Desc: Secure checkout, instant confirmation, and free cancellation on most rates. Talk to the front desk anytime.

location.label: Location
location.heading: P-5 Danao, Panglao.
location.body: Quietly tucked into Bohol's south coast, three and a half kilometres from Panglao International Airport (TAG) and a short stroll to the beach via our seaside garden.
location.f1Body: 3.4 km · ~10 min by car · transfer available
location.f3Body: Direct access · sunrise side of Panglao

footer.tagline: The first international-chain resort in Bohol, in native Filipino detail.

consent.title: Your privacy
consent.body: We use cookies to run the site, remember your preferences, and measure traffic. Choose how we use them.
